codeReview.summary: The docs baseline accurately captured the approved mission scope, initialized the required library artifacts, and avoided overstating unfinished behavior. The worker returned partial only because a pre-existing gate-fast failure existed before this docs-only packet; that runtime regression was subsequently fixed by the next truth-rails feature.

summary: Pass. The documentation packet matched the mission scope and its earlier validator failure was caused by an unrelated pre-existing runtime regression that later features resolved.
